profileInfo.emailInUse: This email is already in use by another account.
profileInfo.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

changePassword.tooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters.
changePassword.failed: Failed to change password. Check your current password.

notifications.masterSwitch: Master switch for all email alerts

categories.credential_security_desc: ZÜP, ZUBB and other security clearances

categories.currency_passenger_desc: 3 T&L in 90 days for carrying passengers

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.saveRecoveryCodes: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. Each can only be used once.
twoFactor.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
twoFactor.invalidCode: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
twoFactor.enabledDesc: Your account is secured with two-factor authentication.

flightData.title: Flight Data
flightData.recalculateDesc: Recalculate all auto-computed fields (solo, XC, distance, day/night split, IFR totals) for every flight.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.warning: These actions are irreversible. Proceed with extreme caution.
dangerZone.deleteFlightsDesc: Permanently remove all flights and import history. Your account, licenses, aircraft, and credentials are preserved.
dangerZone.deleteFlightsConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all your flights and import history. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.deleteDataDesc: Remove all flights, aircraft, licenses, credentials, and import history. Your account remains active.
dangerZone.deleteDataConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all your logbook data. Your account will be preserved but empty.
dangerZone.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This is irreversible.
dangerZone.deleteAccountPrompt: Enter your password to confirm account deletion:
dangerZone.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Check your password.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
